comment: Populated by `bun run scripts/build-rox-design-payload-archive.ts --versions-manifest=runtime-payload-versions.json`. The `current` field points at the version every release lane should pull via `rox-design:prepare --from-archive=<archiveUrl> --expected-sha256=<archiveSha256>`. See `docs/release/rox-design-payload-supply-chain.md`.
